cards.name: biǎn/ㄅㄧㄢˇ
definitions: horizontal rectangular inscribed tablet hung over a door or on a wall

cards.name: béng/ㄅㄥˊ
definitions: contracted form of 不用[bù yòng]

cards.name: bì/ㄅㄧˋ
definitions: used in _陽|_阳[Bì yáng] (the name of a place in Henan)

cards.name: bǐng/ㄅㄧㄥˇ
definitions: handle or shaft (of an axe etc)
(of a flower, leaf or fruit) stem
sth that affords an advantage to an opponent

cards.name: cuō/ㄘㄨㄛ
definitions: to pick up (a powder etc) with the fingertips

cards.name: cuō/ㄘㄨㄛ
definitions: (old) to polish bones, horns, ivory etc into tools

cards.name: cù/ㄘㄨˋ
definitions: (bound form) to cluster; to pile up

cards.name: dì/ㄉㄧˋ
definitions: (bound form) to form an enduring union; to establish (an alliance, a friendship, a nation etc)

cards.name: dìng/ㄉㄧㄥˋ
definitions: to join things together by fixing them in place at one or more points

cards.name: dī/ㄉㄧ
definitions: (onom.) sound of dripping water, a ticking clock etc

cards.name: dǎi/ㄉㄞˇ
definitions: (coll.) to catch; to seize; to capture

cards.name: dǔ/ㄉㄨˇ
definitions: to block up (a road, pipe etc)
(fig.) (of a person) choked up with anxiety or stress

cards.name: fèng/ㄈㄥˋ
definitions: to present respectfully (to superior, ancestor, deity etc)

cards.name: fú/ㄈㄨˊ
definitions: (bound form) a cloth used to wrap or cover

cards.name: fāng/ㄈㄤ
definitions: lane (usually as part of a street name)

cards.name: guà/ㄍㄨㄚˋ
definitions: one of the eight divinatory trigrams of the Book of Changes 易經|易经[Yì jīng]
one of the sixty-four divinatory hexagrams of the Book of Changes 易經|易经[Yì jīng]

cards.name: guī/ㄍㄨㄟ
definitions: (of a responsibility) to be taken care of by

cards.name: gù/ㄍㄨˋ
definitions: variant of the character meaning: to employ, to hire, to rent

cards.name: gā/ㄍㄚ
definitions: used in _肢窩|_肢窝[gā zhi wō]

cards.name: gān/ㄍㄢ
definitions: (bound form) to have to do with; to concern oneself with
one of the ten heavenly stems 天_[tiān gān]

cards.name: gāng/ㄍㄤ
definitions: variant of the character meaning: ridge, mound [gāng]

cards.name: gāng/ㄍㄤ
definitions: head rope of a fishing net

cards.name: gū/ㄍㄨ
definitions: (onom.) for the sound of a bird, an empty stomach etc

cards.name: gǒng/ㄍㄨㄥˇ
definitions: (bound form) to fix in place; to make firm and secure

cards.name: huǎng/ㄏㄨㄤˇ
definitions: (bound form) in a hazy state of mind
(bound form) to snap out of that state
used in _如[huǎng rú] and _若[huǎng ruò]

cards.name: hú/ㄏㄨˊ
definitions: non-Han people, esp. from central Asia

cards.name: jiā/ㄐㄧㄚ
definitions: used in _伙|_伙[jiā huo] and _俱|_俱[jiā jù]

cards.name: jiā/ㄐㄧㄚ
definitions: cangue (wooden collar like stocks used to restrain and punish criminals in China)

cards.name: jì/ㄐㄧˋ
definitions: (bound form) a compound made by mixing ingredients (esp. a medicinal or chemical product)
(bound form) small piece of dough cut from a rolled log, used for making mantou (steamed buns) or dumplings

cards.name: jì/ㄐㄧˋ
definitions: (literary) up to; as far as (as in _今[jì jīn] "up to now")

cards.name: jìn/ㄐㄧㄣˋ
definitions: Western Jin 西_|西_[Xī Jìn] (265–316), Eastern Jin 東_|东_[Dōng Jìn] (317–420) and Later Jin Dynasty (936–946)
short name for Shanxi 山西[Shān xī]

cards.name: jù/ㄐㄩˋ
definitions: used in personal names and place names

cards.name: jī/ㄐㄧ
definitions: variant of the character meaning: (bound form) hungry

cards.name: jǐng/ㄐㄧㄥˇ
definitions: Jing, one of the 28 constellations of Chinese astronomy

cards.name: káng/ㄎㄤˊ
definitions: (fig.) to take on (a burden, duty etc)

cards.name: ké/ㄎㄜˊ
definitions: (coll.) shell (of an egg, nut, crab etc)
case; casing; housing (of a machine or device)

cards.name: kān/ㄎㄢ
definitions: (in _輿|_舆[kān yú]) heaven (contrasted with earth 輿|舆[yú])

cards.name: liáo/ㄌㄧㄠˊ
definitions: short name for Liaoning _寧|_宁[Liáo níng] province

cards.name: luò/ㄌㄨㄛˋ
definitions: white horse with a black mane (archaic)

cards.name: luō/ㄌㄨㄛ
definitions: used in _唆|_唆[luō suo] and _嗦|_嗦[luō suo]

cards.name: là/ㄌㄚˋ
definitions: ancient practice of offering sacrifices to the gods in the 12th lunar month
(bound form) (of meat, fish etc) cured in winter, esp. in the 12th lunar month

cards.name: léi/ㄌㄟˊ
definitions: (bound form) (military) mine, as in 地_[dì léi] land mine
(coll.) to shock; to stun; to astound

cards.name: lí/ㄌㄧˊ
definitions: Li ethnic group of Hainan Province

cards.name: lóng/ㄌㄨㄥˊ
definitions: enclosing frame made of bamboo, wire etc; cage; basket

cards.name: lī/ㄌㄧ
definitions: (modal final particle similar to 呢[ne] or 啦[la])

cards.name: lǒng/ㄌㄨㄥˇ
definitions: crop row; mounded soil forming a ridge in a field

cards.name: lǔ/ㄌㄨˇ
definitions: Lu, an ancient state of China _國|_国[Lǔ guó]
short name for Shandong 山東|山东[Shān dōng]

cards.name: mài/ㄇㄞˋ
definitions: vein (on a leaf, insect wing etc)

cards.name: méi/ㄇㄟˊ
definitions: (on product packaging) classifier for flat items (from Japanese _ "mai")
(old) stick used as a gag to prevent soldiers from talking while sneaking up on the enemy

cards.name: míng/ㄇㄧㄥˊ
definitions: to cry (of birds, animals and insects)

cards.name: pì/ㄆㄧˋ
definitions: to dispel; to refute; to repudiate

cards.name: pò/ㄆㄛˋ
definitions: (literary) soul; mortal soul (i.e. attached to the body)

cards.name: qiān/ㄑㄧㄢ
definitions: inscribed bamboo stick (used in divination, gambling, drawing lots etc)

cards.name: quàn/ㄑㄩㄢˋ
definitions: bond (esp. document split in two, with each party holding one half)

cards.name: qǐ/ㄑㄧˇ
definitions: Qi son of Yu the Great 禹[Yǔ], reported founder of the Xia Dynasty 夏朝[Xià Cháo] (c. 2070-c. 1600 BC)

cards.name: shè/ㄕㄜˋ
definitions: (literary) to wade across a body of water

cards.name: shì/ㄕˋ
definitions: used in 繁_[Fán shì] (the name of a place in Shanxi)

cards.name: téng/ㄊㄥˊ
definitions: to make room; to clear out; to vacate

cards.name: tú/ㄊㄨˊ
definitions: (bound form) disciple; apprentice; believer; (derog.) wrongdoer (as in 騙_|骗_[piàn tú] "swindler" or 叛_[pàn tú] "traitor" etc)
(bound form) to no avail; in vain

cards.name: wén/ㄨㄣˊ
definitions: line; trace; mark; pattern; grain (of wood etc)

cards.name: xiào/ㄒㄧㄠˋ
definitions: (of birds and animals) to screech; to howl; to roar

cards.name: xí/ㄒㄧˊ
definitions: (bound form) to continue the pattern; to perpetuate
(literary) classifier for suits of clothing or sets of bedding

cards.name: yì/ㄧˋ
definitions: (bound form) of ... ancestry (as in 華_|华_[Huá yì] "of Chinese descent")

cards.name: zhào/ㄓㄠˋ
definitions: a cover; a shade; a hood

cards.name: zòng/ㄗㄨㄥˋ
definitions: from front to back; longitudinal; lengthwise (Taiwan pr. [zōng])
military unit corresponding to an army corps (Taiwan pr. [zōng])

cards.name: ào/ㄠˋ
definitions: (bound form) Austria (abbr. for _地利|_地利[Aò dì lì])
(bound form) Olympics (abbr. for _林匹克|_林匹克[Aò lín pǐ kè])

cards.name: āi/ㄞ
definitions: Ai (c. 2000 BC), sixth of legendary Flame Emperors 炎帝[Yán dì] descended from Shennong 神農|神农[Shén nóng] Farmer God, also known as Li 釐|厘[Lí]
(bound form) to grieve for; to pity; to lament; to condole
